description: Control whether the root organization issuer is available for use by the child organizations.

allExistingAndFutureOrgs.hint: The applications which are created in the organizations under {{organizationName}} organization, can use the issuer of {{organizationName}} organization as the token issuer.
allExistingAndFutureOrgs.label: Allow the issuer to be used in all organizations.

none.hint: Do not allow the issuer of this organization to be used in any organizations created under this organization.
none.label: Do not allow the issuer to be used in any organizations.

updateButton.ariaLabel: Issuer usage scope form update button

error.description: Error occurred while fetching issuer usage scope configurations.

success.description: Successfully retrieved the issuer usage scope configurations.

defaultError.description: Error occurred while updating issuer usage scope configurations.

issuerUsedInOrgsError.description: The issuer of this organization is currently being used in the child organizations' applications.

success.description: Successfully updated the issuer usage scope configurations.

title: Issuer Usage Scope
